name: into-connected-emom-complex
rawText:
A. WEIGHTLIFTING
• 4 sets, Every 01:30 minutes:
2 Push PRESS

Into:

• 4 sets, Every 01:30 minutes:
2 Push JERKS

* Work from the floor
** Start at ~65% and build up weight
*** Differentiate between the push press & the push jerk

B. METCON (Medium-Long)
For time:
• 300m run
3 rounds:
20 Russian KB swings
15 Goblet squats
10 T.T.B

• 300m run
2 rounds:
20 Russian KB swings
15 Goblet squats
10 T.T.B

• 300m run
20 Russian KB swings
15 Goblet squats
10 T.T.B

20 minutes T.C.
